---
title: "Welcome to the notebook"
date: 2026-04-04
description: "A placeholder post for future short notes on research, code, and coursework."
categories:
  - placeholder
  - website
comments: false
---

This is a placeholder post that marks the start of the blog section.

The goal of this page is to create a ready-to-use structure for future writing: short research notes, coding reflections from coursework, and project updates that deserve more space than a line on the CV.
